name: Perfect Teams
short_description: Perfect Teams is a Rogue Like deckbuilder in which you have to assemble a team of three characters, each one with unique cards and unique powers, to explore different universes and fight the corruption caused by the fusion. What will be your Perfect Team ?
detailed_description:
Universes have been merged ! This fusion is unstable, each game will be different and new enemies and challenges will await you. You will have to recruit and create a team with heroes from various universes and combine their exclusive cards and powers. What will be your perfect team ?

Features


Unique characters : Each character is unique and owns unique cards, equipments and abilities. It will be primordial to choose wisely your team to defeat the threats to your wolrds.

Unstable universe : Each game, the path to your enemy will be different. Fight powerful enemies, find random events, gather new equipments, it's up to you to choose the path to victory.

Innovative gameplay : In Perfect Teams, the cards you play are important but the order is event more important ! Many cards have a combo effect which triggers when the previous played card is the right color and adds powerful effects to the base card.

Improve your team : After each game, you will unlock new characters, new equipments and improve your team.

Content


  • 18 unique characters to combine
  • 250+ cards
  • 200+ equipments which will alter your gameplay
  • 100+ different fights
  • 50+ random events
  • 861 team combinations, which will be yours ?
